name: out_of_lives_title
description: Display lettering: the words "Out of Lives" in exactly that spelling, gentle arch, chunky knitted-yarn letters in muted blue-grey wool with a small drooping red felt heart, somber but soft. No other text.
prompt_extra: gently arched baseline; thick friendly letterforms with subtle outline; somber but not scary

variants.name: warm
variants.prompt_extra: slightly warmer, cozier tones and a touch more craft detail

variants.name: clean
variants.prompt_extra: slightly simpler, more minimal composition with bolder shapes
